revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Find_a_Grave here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{{grid|}}} {{#property:P535}} | {{#if: {{{author|}}} {{{last|}}} {{{date|}}} {{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}} | {{cite web |url=https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/{{#if: {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id}}}}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P535}}|sep=,}} }} |title={{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }} |publisher=[[Find a Grave]] |work={{{work|}}} |last={{{last|{{{author|}}}}}} |first={{{first|}}} |date={{{date|}}} |access-date={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}} |display-authors={{{display-authors|}}} }} | [https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/{{#if: {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id}}}}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P535}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}]{{#if: {{{work|}}} | , {{{work}}} }} at [[Find a Grave]] }}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P535| {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} }}{{#ifeq: {{Yesno-yes|{{{check-wikidata|}}}}} | yes | {{WikidataCheck|property=P535|value={{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}}|pattern=^%d+|ignore_errors=true}}|category=Find a Grave template with ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} }} | {{[[Template:Find a Grave|Find a Grave]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Find a Grave template missing ID and not in Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if: {{{1|}}} {{{id|}}} {{{grid|}}} {{#property:P535}} | {{#if: {{{author|}}} {{{last|}}} {{{date|}}} {{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}} | {{cite web |url=https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/{{#if: {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id}}}}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P535}}|sep=,}} }} |title={{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }} |publisher=[[Find a Grave]] |work={{{work|}}} |last={{{last|{{{author|}}}}}} |first={{{first|}}} |date={{{date|}}} |access-date={{{accessdate|{{{access-date|}}}}}} |display-authors={{{display-authors|}}} }} | [https://www.findagrave.com/memorial/{{#if: {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} | {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id}}}}}}}}} | {{First word|1={{#property:P535}}|sep=,}} }} {{#if: {{{2|{{{name|}}}}}} | {{{2|{{{name}}}}}} | {{PAGENAMEBASE}} }}]{{#if: {{{work|}}} | , {{{work}}} }} at [[Find a Grave]] }}{{EditAtWikidata|pid=P535| {{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}} }}{{#ifeq: {{Yesno-yes|{{{check-wikidata|}}}}} | yes | {{WikidataCheck|property=P535|value={{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|{{{grid|{{{id|}}}}}}}}}|pattern=^%d+|ignore_errors=true}}|category=Find a Grave template with ID|namespaces=0|nocatsame=1}} }} | {{[[Template:Find a Grave|Find a Grave]]}} template missing ID and not present in Wikidata.{{Main other|}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Find a Grave template missing ID and not in Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
